creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
All versions are security releases and contain important security fixes - read the corresponding security advisories here:

https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-002
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-003
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2023-004

For details about the releases, please see:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1244-and-11530-security-releases-published
